name: nfselib-barueri

metadata.name: nfselib.barueri
metadata.summary: Python Library to genereate Barueri NFS-e

documentation:
# Overview

Python Library to genereate Barueri NFS-e

- Free software: MIT license

## Installation

```
pip install nfselib.barueri
```

You can also install the in-development version with:

```
pip install https://github.com/erpbrasil/nfselib.barueri/archive/main.zip
```

## Documentation

<https://nfselibbarueri.readthedocs.io/>

## Development

To run all the tests run:

```
tox
```

Note, to combine the coverage data from all the tox environments run:

```
.. list-table::
    :widths: 10 90
    :stub-columns: 1

    - - Windows
      - ::

            set PYTEST_ADDOPTS=--cov-append
            tox

    - - Other
      - ::

            PYTEST_ADDOPTS=--cov-append tox

```

## Changelog

### 0.1.0 (2023-04-07)

- First release on PyPI.

methods.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.CampoPosicional.__init__
documentation:
A class representing a positional field in a file.

Args:
    nome (str): The name of the field.
    valor (Any): The value of the field.
    obrigatorio (bool): Whether the field is required or not.
    tipo (str): The type of the data ("ALFA" or "NUM").
    tamanho (int): The size of the field.
    posicao_inicial (int): The starting position of the field.
    posicao_final (int): The ending position of the field.

methods.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.CampoPosicional.exportar
documentation:
Formats and exports the field value based on its type.

Returns:
    str: The formatted field value.

methods.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.Registro.exportar
documentation:
Exports the record by concatenating its fields.

Returns:
    str: The concatenated fields.

methods.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.Registro.__setattr__
documentation:
Sets the value of a field in the record.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the field.
    value (Any): The new value of the field.

Raises:
    AttributeError: If the field name is not recognized.

methods.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.Registro.__getattr__
documentation:
Gets the value of a field in the record.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the field.

Raises:
    AttributeError: If the field name is not recognized.

Returns:
    Any: The value of the field.

class_variables.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.Registro.campos
documentation: A list to store the fields in the record

methods.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.Arquivo.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a new file object.

Args:
    registros (list[Registro], optional): A list of records in the file. Defaults to None.

methods.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.Arquivo.adicionar_registro
documentation:
Adds a record to the file.

Args:
    registro (Registro): The record to be added.

methods.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.Arquivo.exportar_txt
documentation:
Exports the file as a text file.

Args:
    caminho_arquivo (str): The file path to save the exported file.

methods.name: nfselib.barueri.exportador.Arquivo.exportar
documentation:
Exports the file as a string.

Returns:
    str: The concatenated records in the file.
